name: Ecommerce Product Image QA
description: Business-level visual QA checklist for ecommerce product listing images. Intended for upper-layer Skills or vision QA providers, not hardcoded gateway behavior.

severity_scale.warning: Usable but should be shown to the user with a caution.
severity_scale.severe_warning: Likely unsuitable; ask user whether to regenerate.
severity_scale.fail: Reserved for upper-layer policies; gateway itself should not fail successful generation because of visual QA.

checks.description: Generated product should preserve the original product's shape, color, material, key structure, logo/brand placement if present, and distinctive details.
examples: Fabric texture or color deviates from reference
checks.suggestion: If identity is materially changed, suggest regenerating that image with stronger reference/product-lock instructions.

checks.description: Product should not be warped, melted, duplicated unexpectedly, asymmetrical in impossible ways, or physically implausible.
examples: Distorted zipper, button, nozzle, cap, or label

checks.description: Main product should be clearly visible, not overly cropped, blocked, blurry, tiny, or hidden by props.
Image should match its intended ecommerce slot, such as main image, lifestyle scene, feature callout, size comparison, package contents, SKU/color variant, or detail close-up.

slot_guidance.main: Clean background, product centered, minimal distractions, no unsupported props.
slot_guidance.lifestyle: Scene should support buyer imagination without changing product identity.
slot_guidance.feature: Feature should be visually obvious and not contradicted by the image.
slot_guidance.detail: Close-up should preserve texture and structural details.
slot_guidance.sku: Variant color/style must match the requested SKU.

checks.description: Any visible text should be intentional, legible, correctly spelled, and not garbled. If the prompt requested no text, generated text is a warning.
Image should not visually imply unsupported claims, certifications, medical effects, waterproof/fireproof properties, or impossible performance unless supplied by product brief.
If humans appear, hands, fingers, body posture, face, and product interaction should look natural and non-distracting.
escalate_to_severe_when: Human interaction misrepresents product size or usage

checks.description: Product scale should be plausible relative to hands, furniture, packaging, or other props.
Background and props should not create confusion about included items, product category, target audience, or package contents.
Flag likely marketplace risks such as watermarks, competitor logos, misleading badges, explicit content, unsafe usage scenes, or forbidden before/after claims.
Lighting, shadows, reflections, resolution, edge quality, and color balance should be commercially acceptable.

agent_guidance.default_user_message: 图片已生成；以下是可选质检提醒，不会自动重试。若需要，我可以按编号重试。
must_not: Do not auto-retry solely because ecommerce QA reports a visual warning.
Do not silently discard successful images.
Do not claim product identity is verified unless reference-image comparison was actually performed.
